case_title: SANTANA LINDA A VS SILKROUTE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,160.95 FILED BY SANTANA LINDA A AS TO DEFENDANT SILKROUTE CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
